docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPORT CYCLE LEASING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2008 BY PRO TEM. PRO TEM COMMISSIONER: MICHELLE MCGILL, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. NOT REPORTED. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-07-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT "GRANTED".
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY LOO, BRADY SPORT CYCLE LEASING, INC. CHU, STEVE
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF LOO, BRADY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2008 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT CHU, STEVE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY LOO, BRADY AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED JUL-09-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHU, STEVE
AMENDED COMPLAINT TO ADD 2ND PLAINTIFF & DECLARATION STATED DEFENDANT HAS NOT BEEN SERVED. REQUESTING TO RESET NEW COURT DATE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOO, BRADY SPORT CYCLE LEASING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHU, STEVE $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $51.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,801.30, THE COURT FINDS THAT BOTH DRIVERS WREE AT FAULT AND REDUCES THE JUDGMENT BY 50%. PLAINTIFF MADE UNSAFE LANE CHANGE; DEFENDANT WAS SPEEDING AND INATTENTIVE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEFENDANT CHU, STEVE
